title: Awesome De Novo Peptide Sequencing
description: A comprehensive, curated, and interactive map of the de novo peptide sequencing field — algorithms, post-processors, downstream applications, and adjacent tools, covering both deep-learning and classical approaches. Includes a SQLite database of papers, models, authors, affiliations, and venues, alongside a Quarto-based interactive website with Observable JS visualisations tracking publication impact, journal metrics, and GitHub activity across the field.
notes: Live interactive site: https://jeroen.vangoey.be/awesome_de_novo_peptide_sequencing/. Source code and SQLite database: https://github.com/BioGeek/awesome_de_novo_peptide_sequencing.
